recommended_action: Apply vendor firmware patch immediately; isolate management plane from internet; block inbound connections on VPN ports until patched; review VPN logs for IOCs from past 30 days
validation_evidence: Patch record, firewall rule screenshot, VPN access log review

recommended_action: Rotate all VPN admin credentials; enforce MFA on VPN management; review active sessions for unauthorized access; apply vendor patch
validation_evidence: Credential rotation log, MFA config record, session audit

recommended_action: Patch API gateway immediately; rotate all API keys and tokens; add regression authentication test to CI/CD pipeline; review API logs for unauthorized access
validation_evidence: Patch record, key rotation evidence, auth test result

recommended_action: Patch web framework; deploy WAF rule as temporary mitigation; review web server logs for exploitation indicators; conduct code review of affected module
validation_evidence: Patch record, WAF rule evidence, web log review

recommended_action: Patch platform to latest version; audit all project permissions; review admin activity logs; rotate credentials stored in project configs
validation_evidence: Patch record, permission audit, admin activity log

recommended_action: Rotate all exposed secrets immediately; migrate secrets to vault-backed storage; scan build logs for leaked credentials; enforce secrets scanning in pipeline
validation_evidence: Secret rotation evidence, vault config, pipeline scan report

recommended_action: Apply Jenkins/TeamCity patch; restrict CLI access by IP; review files potentially accessed; rotate SSH keys and stored credentials
validation_evidence: Patch record, access restriction config, file review log

recommended_action: Apply Citrix ADC patch; terminate all active sessions; invalidate session tokens; monitor for anomalous session reuse
validation_evidence: Patch record, session termination evidence, monitoring config

recommended_action: Apply SolarWinds WHD patch immediately; isolate help desk from privileged network segments; review endpoint activity on connected machines
validation_evidence: Patch record, network segmentation evidence, endpoint review

recommended_action: Remove public access to admin API endpoint; restrict to internal IPs only; rotate admin credentials; review API access logs
validation_evidence: Firewall rule, IP restriction config, access log review

recommended_action: Patch Confluence immediately; disable OGNL template evaluation if patch unavailable; audit space permissions; review server logs for exploitation
validation_evidence: Patch record, OGNL disable config, space audit log

recommended_action: Apply Exchange CU patch; enable Extended Protection for Authentication; disable legacy authentication protocols; review mail flow logs
validation_evidence: Patch record, EPA config, auth protocol settings

recommended_action: Patch database engine; review and remove excessive privileges; implement least-privilege DB accounts; monitor for unusual privilege use
validation_evidence: Patch record, privilege audit, monitoring config

recommended_action: Remove public bucket policy; enforce Block Public Access; enable access logging; review CloudTrail for unauthorized reads
validation_evidence: Cloud config snapshot, access log review, CloudTrail report

recommended_action: Disable Kubernetes dashboard or enforce RBAC and authentication; remove default admin tokens; review cluster access logs
validation_evidence: Dashboard config, RBAC policy, access log

recommended_action: Upgrade PHP to supported version; disable CGI mode; apply vendor patch; deploy WAF rule; review server logs for exploitation
validation_evidence: PHP version record, CGI config, WAF rule, web log review

recommended_action: Enable encryption at rest on backup storage; verify encryption key management; test backup restoration process
validation_evidence: Encryption config, key management record, restoration test

recommended_action: Isolate asset from network immediately; plan urgent migration to supported OS; implement compensating controls including network micro-segmentation and enhanced monitoring
validation_evidence: Network isolation evidence, migration plan, compensating control list

recommended_action: Migrate to supported PostgreSQL version; apply vendor-provided upgrade path; do not expose to internet during migration
validation_evidence: Upgrade plan, version check post-migration

recommended_action: Install approved EDR agent; verify check-in with EDR console; investigate recent activity on endpoint for signs of compromise
validation_evidence: EDR console check-in record, deployment evidence

recommended_action: Apply Citrix ADC patch for CVE-2023-4966; invalidate all active sessions; review session logs for token theft indicators
validation_evidence: Patch record, session invalidation log, monitoring evidence

recommended_action: Patch or replace vulnerable plugin; add WAF rule to block exploit path; review web logs for scanning or exploitation activity
validation_evidence: Plugin version, WAF rule, web log review

recommended_action: Apply PodSecurityAdmission policy to deny privileged containers; rebuild images with non-root user; rescan images post-remediation
validation_evidence: PodSecurityAdmission config, image rebuild record, scan report

recommended_action: Remove privileged flag from pod specs; implement OPA/Gatekeeper policies to prevent recurrence; audit all running pods
validation_evidence: Pod spec change, OPA policy, pod audit report

recommended_action: Review and restrict firewall inbound rules to minimum required ports; document business justification for remaining rules; schedule quarterly review
validation_evidence: Firewall rule change record, documentation

recommended_action: Enable Vault audit log to a secured remote syslog destination; verify log ingestion into SIEM; alert on policy violations
validation_evidence: Vault audit config, SIEM ingestion evidence

recommended_action: Identify business owner via IT asset management process; assign owner; determine if asset is still required; decommission if not needed
validation_evidence: Asset management record, owner assignment, decommission confirmation

recommended_action: Schedule and execute DR failover test within 30 days; document results; remediate gaps found during test
validation_evidence: DR test report, gap remediation plan

recommended_action: Conduct database access review; apply principle of least privilege; revoke unnecessary rights; document access justifications
validation_evidence: Access review report, revocation evidence

recommended_action: Apply Microsoft patches; enable SMB signing; block NTLM where possible; monitor for NTLM relay attacks in SIEM
validation_evidence: Patch record, SMB signing config, SIEM alert config
